task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user profile, avatar, or sidebar indicates the active user is 'admin', or the agent has successfully accessed the 'Administration' panel which requires admin privileges.

task_completion.description: Verify a public channel named 'announcements' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left sidebar channel list displays '# announcements', indicating it is a public channel.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'announcements' channel is set to Read Only.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The channel settings/edit panel shows the 'Read Only' toggle enabled, or the message input box at the bottom of the channel displays a message like 'This room is read only'.

task_completion.description: Verify the channel topic is set to 'Official company news and updates'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Official company news and updates' is visible in the channel header (next to or below the channel name) or inside the Room Info/Edit panel under the 'Topic' field.

task_completion.description: Verify 'announcements' was added to the system's default channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Administration settings (typically under Workspace -> Settings -> Accounts -> Default Channels or similar), the 'announcements' channel is visible as a selected tag/item in the Default Channels input field.

task_completion.description: Verify 'general' was removed from the system's default channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the same Administration settings for Default Channels, the 'general' channel is no longer present in the input field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat web interface being navigated (menus, buttons, forms) rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual deployed application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local URL/IP for the Rocket.Chat instance, not a local file path (file://) or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated through the necessary UI steps to achieve the goal.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a logical progression of screenshots showing the creation of the channel, editing its settings, and navigating to the Administration panel, rather than just a single screenshot of the final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target channel name is 'announcements'. Target topic is 'Official company news and updates'. Channel to remove from defaults is 'general'. Admin username is 'admin'.
